leadText: The Full Incense (Japanese: まんぷくおこう Full Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It is an incense that allows Snorlax to produce Munchlax Eggs. In battle, its effect is identical to the Lagging Tail.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Forces the holder to move last in its priority bracket, regardless of its Speed . This item is unaffected by Trick Room . If a Full Incense is gained, lost, or suppressed, then it will not affect turn order until the beginning of the next turn. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] If multiple Pokémon holding a Lagging Tail or Full Incense use moves with the same priority, the Pokémon with the lower Speed will move first (regardless of Trick Room). A Pokémon with Stall moves before Pokémon holding a Lagging Tail or Full Incense. If a Pokémon with Stall also holds a Lagging Tail or Full Incense, Stall does not affect when the Pokémon moves. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] If multiple Pokémon with the Ability Stall or that are holding a Lagging Tail or Full Incense use moves with the same priority, the Pokémon move relatively according to Speed (the order is reversed during Trick Room). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a pairing in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery that would produce a Snorlax Egg , a Munchlax Egg is produced instead.

Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] If multiple Pokémon with the Ability Stall or that are holding a Lagging Tail or Full Incense use moves with the same priority, the Pokémon move relatively according to Speed (the order is reversed during Trick Room).

It is an exotic-smelling incense that makes the holder bloated and slow moving. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This exotic-smelling incense makes the holder bloated and slow moving. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that makes the holder move slower than usual.
